legal_notice.title: 1. Owner identification
legal_notice.html:
This website and the {{product.app_name}} app ({{product.domain}}) are owned by {{company.name}}, tax ID {{company.nif}}, registered at {{company.address}}, {{company.country}}. Contact email: {{company.email}}.

Commercial register: {{company.reg_merc}}

legal_notice.title: 2. Purpose and acceptance
legal_notice.html: This Legal Notice governs access to and use of {{product.app_name}}. Access implies acceptance of these terms and, where applicable, the Terms of Use.

legal_notice.title: 3. Users and minors
legal_notice.html: The platform is intended for adults. Children under 16 may not create an account. Adults may record sports information about third parties, including minors, in accordance with the Content & Image Policy.

legal_notice.title: 4. Intellectual property
legal_notice.html: The software, design and interface of {{product.app_name}} belong to {{company.name}} or its licensors. Use does not grant any intellectual property rights.

legal_notice.title: 5. Liability
legal_notice.html: {{company.name}} is not liable for data, images or videos the user stores on the device, nor for damage arising from misuse of the application.

legal_notice.title: 6. Third-party links and services
legal_notice.html: The app integrates third-party services (e.g. Supabase in {{providers.supabase_region}} for the database, Stripe in {{providers.stripe_region}} for payments, {{providers.hosting}} for hosting and {{providers.analytics}} for analytics). See the Privacy Policy.

legal_notice.title: 7. Applicable law and jurisdiction
legal_notice.html: The law of {{legal.jurisdiction}} applies and, unless mandatory rules provide otherwise, the courts of the consumer user’s domicile.

privacy.title: 1. Data controller
privacy.html: Controller: {{company.name}} ({{company.email}}). A Data Protection Officer has not been appointed for the time being.

privacy.title: 2. Data we process
privacy.html:
• Account: name, surname, email and phone (optional).
  • Service use: sports statistics created by the user about third parties.
  • Media: images and videos stored locally on the device, not in the cloud.
  • Payments: transaction identification managed by Stripe.
  • Analytics: measurements with {{providers.analytics}}.

privacy.title: 3. Purposes and legal bases
privacy.html:
• Service and subscription (performance of contract).
  • Usage analytics (consent; see Cookie Policy).
  • Renewal notifications (consent).
  • Security and fraud prevention (legitimate interest).

privacy.title: 4. Origin and accuracy
privacy.html: Data comes from the user. If you record information about third parties, you warrant sufficient legitimacy (e.g. consent of image rights holders for minors).

privacy.title: 5. Retention
privacy.html:
• Account and records: while the account exists. Billing data: 6 years.
  • Security logs: 12 months unless incidents require longer.
  • Analytics and consents: until withdrawn.

privacy.title: 6. Recipients and processors
privacy.html:
• Supabase (EU/Ireland) as database provider.
  • Stripe for payments.
  • {{providers.hosting}} for hosting.
  • {{providers.analytics}} (configured according to consent).

No international transfers outside the EEA beyond those inherent to these providers and covered by their compliance mechanisms.

privacy.title: 7. Rights
privacy.html: You may exercise access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction and portability by writing to {{legal.data_subject_email}}. Response time: 1 month.

privacy.title: 8. Security measures
privacy.html: Encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest in database services, access controls, provider backups and data minimisation. Media (photos/videos) are stored in local device storage controlled by the user.

privacy.title: 9. Minors
privacy.html: Children under 16 cannot create an account. Adults who register data or images of minors declare sufficient legitimacy and must comply with the Content & Image Policy.

cookies.title: 1. What are cookies?
cookies.html: We use cookies and similar technologies so the site works and, if you accept, to measure usage with {{providers.analytics}}.

cookies.title: 2. Settings
cookies.html:
You can customise preferences in the Cookie preferences banner. Categories used:

  • Necessary: essential for operation (login, security).
  • Analytics: usage measurement with {{providers.analytics}} (requires consent unless AEPD exempt mode).
  • Functional: non-essential improvements.
  • Marketing: not used currently.

cookies.title: 3. Cookies we use
cookies.html:
Necessary

  • Supabase session: {{cookies.session}}.
  • Stripe (checkout): {{cookies.stripe}}.

Analytics

  • Google Analytics 4: {{cookies.ga4}}.

We may also use local storage (IndexedDB/localStorage) for content and preferences.

cookies.title: 4. How to change or withdraw consent
cookies.html: You can reopen the preferences panel from the “Cookies” link in the footer, or clear cookies in your browser settings.

terms.title: 2. Account and access
terms.html: The account is personal and for users over 16. An adult may register third-party athletes.

terms.title: 3. Plans and payments
terms.html: Payments are processed with Stripe. Invoices are issued by Stripe.

terms.title: 4. Withdrawal and refunds
terms.html: You have 14 days from purchase to request a refund if you have not consumed services that legally prevent it.

terms.title: 5. User content
terms.html: You are responsible for data and images you store. You must comply with applicable law and our Content Policy.

terms.title: 6. Limitation of liability
terms.html: The service is provided “as is” with reasonable diligence.

subscription.title: 1. Purchase process
subscription.html: Subscriptions are managed through Stripe. Once payment is confirmed, access is activated.

subscription.title: 2. Renewals and notices
subscription.html: We may send renewal notices if you consent.

subscription.title: 3. Billing
subscription.html: The invoice is the one generated by Stripe and will be available on your payment receipt.

subscription.title: 4. Withdrawal
subscription.html: 14-day right of withdrawal under consumer law, subject to applicable legal exceptions.

content_policy.title: 1. Scope
content_policy.html: Governs use of images and videos and recording data about third parties, including minors.

content_policy.title: 2. Image rights
content_policy.html: If you store images or videos of third parties, you must have their consent. For minors, consent must be given by their legal guardian.

content_policy.title: 3. Prohibitions
content_policy.html: Uploading or keeping unlawful, defamatory content or content that infringes third-party rights is prohibited.

content_policy.title: 4. Content removal
content_policy.html: We may require removal of content that breaches this policy or the law. You can contact {{legal.data_subject_email}}.
